segments.text: Deliver me from my enemies, O God; be my fortress against those who are attacking me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Deliver me from evildoers and save me from those who are after my blood.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: See how they lie in wait for me!
Fierce men conspire against me for no offense or sin of mine, Lord.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I have done no wrong, yet they are ready to attack me. Arise to help me; look on my plight!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You, Lord God Almighty, you who are the God of Israel, rouse yourself to punish all the nations; show no mercy to wicked traitors.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They return at evening, snarling like dogs, and prowl about the city.
See what they spew from their mouths—
the words from their lips are sharp as swords, and they think,
Who can hear us?
segments.speaker: Enemies

segments.text: But you laugh at them, Lord; you scoff at all those nations.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You are my strength, I watch for you; you, God, are my fortress,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: my God on whom I can rely. God will go before me and will let me gloat over those who slander me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But do not kill them, Lord our shield, or my people will forget. In your might uproot them and bring them down.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For the sins of their mouths, for the words of their lips, let them be caught in their pride. For the curses and lies they utter,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: consume them in your wrath, consume them till they are no more. Then it will be known to the ends of the earth that God rules over Jacob.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They return at evening, snarling like dogs, and prowl about the city.
They wander about for food and howl if not satisfied.
But I will sing of your strength, in the morning I will sing of your love; for you are my fortress, my refuge in times of trouble.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You are my strength, I sing praise to you; you, God, are my fortress, my God on whom I can rely.
segments.speaker: David
